chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Revision Application No.S-127 of 2022 Criminal Transfer Application No.S-35 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 10.10.2022 Mr. Sajjad Ahmed Chandio advocate for applicants. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General. ----- I have heard both the parties. These two applications are disposed of in the terms whereby the impugned order dated 24.05.2021, whereby learned trial court on account of absence of DWs closed side of the accused for examining defense witnesses and put off the case to next date for final arguments, is set aside. The applicants / accused are directed to examine defense witnesses within a period of one month and the trial court then dispose of the case in accordance with law. JUDGE Ali Haider
